mano_cua.result_summary: 两个bug复现：1.点击当月普通日期（15号、20号）时错误触发onActiveStartDateChange回调（action=undefined），按预期不应触发；2.所有onActiveStartDateChange调用的action字段始终为undefined（导航按钮也是undefined而非next/prev）。Callback Log清晰记录了每次点击的回调序列。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: onActiveStartDateChange fired incorrectly on same-month date click with action=undefined. Bug stably reproduced twice.

deploy_notes.workaround: Used npm react-calendar@3.0.0 in sample/parcel. Modified Sample.jsx to include onActiveStartDateChange callback and log display.
